affected_pattern: Metered Minutes-of-Use overage credit not applied to enterprise voice customers
root_cause: Overage-credit generator skipped an accounting period — a calendar-library bug caused the generator to treat the month as having 0 periods after a leap-second, producing no credit rows for that month.
supporting_evidence: SLA Breach RCA Playbook: Calendar Leap-Second Defect pattern
Generator log: 'periods=0' for the affected month
Library upgrade notes flag this as a known regression
recommended_action: Upgrade or patch the calendar library
Re-run the credit generator for the affected month
Add an assertion that generated-credit count > 0 for any active month
